ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment ended */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator leading the experiment */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the experiment was conducted */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the experiment */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed, paused) */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* List of additional researchers or institutions involved in the experiment */,
  "ethics_approval" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the experiment has received ethics approval */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Track whether the results of the experiment have been published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the researcher is affiliated */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., Principal Investigator, Co-Researcher) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  "publications" TEXT /* Publications of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the data belongs to */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time of the model */,
  "predicted_response_time" REAL /* Predicted response time of the model */,
  "predicted_accuracy" REAL /* Predicted accuracy of the model */,
  "condition" INTEGER /* Condition under which the data was collected */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the data was collected */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "experiment_version" INTEGER /* Version of the experiment the data belongs to */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score for the data point */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_data_condition FOREIGN KEY ("condition") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Specific environmental conditions (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "operational_conditions" TEXT /* Specific operational conditions (e.g., system load, network latency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file contents */,
  "file_version" INTEGER /* Version of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., text, markdown) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file contents */,
  "file_version" INTEGER /* Version of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the user is affiliated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES experimental_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_author" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., addition, modification, deletion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES experimental_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_version_author FOREIGN KEY ("version_author") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_setup" (
  "setup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental setup */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the setup belongs to */,
  "setup_name" TEXT /* Name of the experimental setup */,
  "setup_description" TEXT /* Description of the experimental setup */,
  "setup_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the experimental setup */,
  "setup_version" INTEGER /* Version of the experimental setup */,
  "setup_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score for the experimental setup */,
  "setup_approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the setup (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_setup_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
